children.text: a valid private pilots certificate issued by the Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration under part 61 of title 14, Code of Federal Regulations; and
the appropriate medical certificate issued by the Administrator under part 67 of such title,

children.heading: .—Revocation of Airmen Certificates
children.label: b .—Revocation of Airmen Certificates
children.text: The Administrator shall issue an order revoking a certificate issued to an airman under if the Administrator finds that while acting as a pilot in command of an aircraft, the airman has permitted another individual to manipulate the controls of the aircraft in violation of subsection (a).section 44703 of this title

children.heading: .—Pilot in Command Defined
children.label: c .—Pilot in Command Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “pilot in command” has the meaning given such term by section 1.1 of title 14, Code of Federal Regulations.
